message:
fix(cli): fresh eyes review - validation and efficiency improvements

- Move load_default_allowlists() outside loops in allowlist_list/validate
- Add validate_expiration_date() for ISO 8601 format checking
- Add validate_condition() for KEY=VALUE format checking
- Add tests for new validation functions
- Add #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)] to format_step_details_summary
- Fix JSON output layer formatting (use label() instead of Debug)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
